description: CompositionWhite running shorts made of 100% polyester Dri-Fit fabric, has an attached underwear on the inside, elasticated waistband with a drawstring, mesh on the sides and swoosh logo in a reflective material towards the left hemlineFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not bleach, iron or dry cleanLine dryBuilt with the breathability and zero-distraction fit that athletes demand, this pair of nike running shorts comes in a simple design. These high-performance shorts created with Dri-Fit fabric wick sweat away from the body and keep you cool, dry and comfortable. Team it with tees and running shoes.
